EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} restored the file "{object.name}" from quarantine on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} could not restore the file "{object.name}" from quarantine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.name} could not remove the file "{object.name}" from quarantine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.name} removed the file "{object.name}" from quarantine on host {event_src.host}
